item.title: Irrigating using a bag of water so that the soil absorbs as much water as needed
item.description: This is done to give the soil enough time to suck up enough water. In hot regions the first layers of the soil are so thick that water need a little time to get into the soil. If there wouldn’t be a bag like this, the water would be too fast and the amount of water in certain parts would be too little.
item.dc:creator: ImpatientMoth

item.title: Repost because this is real
item.dc:creator: imalovernotapanda

item.title: Ukrainian millionaire has army bomb his home when he finds out Russians are using it
item.description:
A Ukrainian millionaire contacted Kyiv's military to bomb his own house after he spied Russian invaders using it as a military base to fire rockets on the property's webcam. Businessman Andrey Stavnitser handed over coordinates to the house in the outskirts of the capital once he realised it was housing military targets, sacrificing the ‘beautiful’ home he had only just finished building to destroy 12 Russian vehicles. ‘It was kind of an obvious decision for me, there is not much you can do nowadays to help military, and that was one of the opportunities that I had,’ he told Good Morning Britain.
He was able to count the destroyed vehicles from the webcam after the bombardment was over. Approximately 12 military vehicles were destroyed. ‘It’s not about money, it’s about effort put into the house,’ he added. ‘I just finished building it. It was a beautiful house, actually. [But] I want to do everything possible to help Ukraine win because we are safeguarding Europe.’ The millionaire knows the Ukrainian president Zelensky personally and had worked with him when the government was developing a Covid-19 strategy for the south of Ukraine. He said he is proud to have a president like Zelensky and thanked Britain for its support during the war, calling on the country to ramp up its weapons shipments and military support for Ukraine. Source: https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-10728289/Ukrainian-millionaire-tells-military-bomb-home-spying-Russian-troops-webcam.html
Stavnitser was forced to flee his home in Ukraine when Vladimir Putin’s troops invaded the village and occupied his home on March 5 Stavnitser had left security behind to guard his home, but the Russian forces captured and interrogated the security team after stripping them naked. He later heard the Russians were looking for ‘Nazi messaging’ on their phones, which they destroyed after failing to find evidence of Nazification in Ukraine. After a few days of capture, the Russian forces released the security guards, sending them out into the woods where they walked for days through the wilderness without being found. As their phones were destroyed, they were unable to contact anyone. Eventually, they reached shelter, and soon got in contact with their employer – the man whose house had just been invaded.
‘If you were to ask me two months ago, what would I feel if there were hostile military people inside my house, I would have said fury and anger,’ said Stavnitser. ‘However, this is not what I felt. I felt disgusted, dirty, looking at some guys walking inside my house.' After speaking with his security team and hearing they had survived, the millionaire came up with an idea. He began to check each camera in the house individually, but to his disappointment found most of them destroyed. But the Russians had missed one. A small webcam was still operating, unbeknownst to the Russians, allowing Stavnitser to spy on the invaders now occupying his home.
What he saw was throngs of military uniforms. As well as taking his possessions, Russian troops were using it as a warehouse to store stolen good from neighbouring Ukrainians – piling TVs, laptops and iPads into the rooms. To his horror, he saw military vehicles passing by a window, including a BM-21 Grad rocket launcher system. With a range of 40 kilometers, he realised his home was being used as a staging ground to fire rockets into Kyiv and kill his fellow countrymen. After that, he said the decision was simple. He passed the coordinates to the Ukrainian military and told them to attack.
item.dc:creator: Igotfourbedrats

item.title: We are loosing a fellow Imgurarian today and I'm here to say "See ya on the other"
item.description: Here is the story - https://imgur.com/gallery/prUy1Kt I have never met her, I only know about her by what she has posted and I only recently (about 2 weeks ago) knew she even existed but, an impression has been left. As I read through her posts about life, I was struck with her courage and fortitude and can only hope that when I see my end on the horizon, I will be as strong. I have lived twice the years that she will and her posts have reminded me that we only get one ride in this world and none of us know how long that ride is. "In the words of Winnie the Pooh, how lucky I am to have something that makes saying goodbye so hard. That silly old bear sure did know a thing or two about living your best life, but my guy Eeyore came up with the best quote of all: “it never hurts to keep looking for sunshine.” I’ve tried so hard to do that, no matter what shite has been thrown at me. Boredom makes you count every second, whilst terminal illness makes every second count. Fill your life with as much passion and wonder as you can muster. Also remember that cancer is not the only terminal illness: fear, poverty, addiction, loneliness. They are all just a lethal as my cancer. Look out for each other, when you can." - benedictcucumberpatch
item.dc:creator: SunAnvil

item.title: “That’s in direct contrast w/ our predecessor who withheld military aid from Ukraine which McCarthy who’s (now) critical of us defended at the time as ‘the rightful thing to do’ b/c he claimed there was corruption in Zelensky admin”
item.description: Contact your representatives and tell them what you think about this: https://www.usa.gov/elected-officials. It doesn’t matter what their party affiliation is, they need to hear your opinion. Register to vote and/or check the status of your voter registration by going here: IWillVote.com Be sure to vote in every election, including the “small” ones. The “big” politicians often got their start by winning the small elections. You can help weed out the bad ones early. #vote
item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight

item.title: Tacos for Lunch?
item.description: Birria de Cordero Recipe by Chef Nico Perez 1 lamb shank 3 onions 3 tomatoes 5 garlic cloves 4 guajillo peppers deveined/deseeded 4 ancho peppers deveined/deseeded 3 cups of water to hydrate the peppers 1.5 litres vegetable stock 2 tablespoons oregano 5 bay leaves 1 cinnamon stick - Consommé - Grill tomatoes, onions, and garlic until soft and caramelised. Hydrate the peppers in the water. Blend all these together until smooth. - Meat - Brown the lamb on high heat in a dutch oven. Add the blended mix followed by vegetable stock, oregano, cinnamon, and bay leaves. Cover and simmer low-and-slow for at least 7 hrs. - Serve - Dip corn tortillas in the consommé and fry on both sides. Add shredded meat and cheese and fold tortilla. Continue to fry until cheese is melted. Serve with a side of consommé for dipping. ¡Buen provecho, User Sub! EDIT - forgot the meat in the ingredients list. Looks like a 2 or 3 lb lamb shank?
item.dc:creator: AkitaFuriosa

item.title: Pencil sketch I just made, titled “Why can’t you be more like your father?”
item.description: A moment of silence occurs, and I remain without any expression. “Dumpling, I am sorry. I shouldn’t had said that.” “Mom, it’s fine. You tell me often.”

item.title: Hardest decision I've ever made in my life.
item.description: Someone can only take the abuse for so long. The truth is, I'm not in a good space mentally and my wife only makes it worse with her constant belittling. I feel betrayed by the lies she told me before we got married. She thinks my hobbies aren't charming, but childish. She thinks my music is loud and obnoxious instead of unique and charming. She pushed me to make job changes I never wanted because they paid more so she could eventually quit. More than anything my dreams which seemed an attractive trait to her was actually something the couldn't stand the idea of. Everything she ever did in our relationship was to try and conince me that she could just stop working and become a mother, when neither of us are ready. When she was so angry at me she quit her job to stay with her family out of state "to cool off" and shorted us on money for the month so I can't pay bills, I knew that was it. Wish me luck guys, because I'm short on cash, short on patience and short on happiness. I I'd give anything to just escape this hell for a day. Edit 1: For the record, I did not initially text her "I want a divorce" . I called her before she got on her flight to go visit her parents. Money for the flight was taken out of our account, putting us in the red. She said she doesn't care if I end up not able to pay bills, that I can "let the food in the fridge rot" when the electric bill comes due, for all she cares. I told her she doesn't care about me and if she gets on this flight, it's over. She thought I was bluffing, went to washington, I packed all her stuff and told her it's in a small 10 dollar storage unit. She flipped. Edit 2: Sorry for being slow on all the replies, guys! I'm working and concrete pouring doesn't leave a lot of time to get on your phone. Edit 3: Most viral! thanks fellas, I was just yelling into the void a little. Since people have asked, I'm not in a position to really deny any charity at the moment. Money is going to be really tight for a while. https://www.gofundme.com/f/help-jay-pay-for-bills-and-get-his-feet-under-him?utm_source=customer&utm_medium=copy_link&utm_campaign=p_cf+share-flow-1
